messages.message: I will be reinforcing my southern border this turn. I hope our mutual positions remain unchallenged.

Hi Germany! Would you be interested in cooperating to stop the western juggernaut that so frequently dominates the game? I think that our two nations make natural allies given our central positioning and how our forces can move outward from one another without being a threat to each other!

Greetings!
I reckon a juggernaut could be quite effective and easy to disguise early on. Would you be interested in that?

Hey France!

I think we make natural allies and would really like to work together. Any interest in pulling a Western Triple or just a straight up EF? Either way, I hope we can agree that we both benefit a lot by not fighting each other.
Hey Turkey! I absolutely love the idea of a juggernaut, especially since it also seems quite stealthy to the rest of the board. Do you prefer a bounce in the Black Sea or a DMZ?
I intend to focus on securing my own centers first. I trust your movements will respect our shared frontier.
I am planning to send my fleet to Rumania. If you prefer to bounce, I can do that instead
Hi France, I totally agree! I think both of our powers benefit hugely from a strong relationship. I am open to collaborating, let me know if you have any specific ideas in mind!
Yes I agree that we would both benefit a lot from not fighting one another. Would you be interested in a classic EF against the rest of the board?
Yes I am absolutely down with that! I will be moving to take Iberia but otherwise focus north
My fleet remains prepared to defend southern Italy. I hope our paths do not cross.
Hi Italy! I look forward to working with you. How would you feel about DMZ Tyr and Adr?
I will remain focused on securing southern Italy. I hope our mutual interests align in keeping the region stable.
Yep, that's exactly what I had in mind. Shall we DMZ the channel?
I have no interest in conflict along our border at this time. I remain open to discussions that preserve regional stability.
I do not have any specific ideas at the moment. I am going to go for Iberia and see where the board is at. Have you had any communication with England yet?
Yes I agree with that. I assume that you will be moving to take Scandinavia in year 1? I will be taking Iberia but let me know if you have ideas to work together on something!
Agreed! Have you heard anything from Austria or Turkey yet?
Also DMZ in Piedmont?
I have no intentions to come your way
It's a tough call but I'd say a bounce would be the best for a cover
No not yet, you?
Sounds good. Would you be interested in a Western Triple? That could help us eliminate Germany pretty quickly. I haven't mentioned it to Germany yet though, just so you know.
Have you heard from Austria yet?
We have just agreed to a DMZ in English Channel so far. They reached out to me about potentially working together but I was not planning on it
Hey Austria, how are you?
Yes a western triple is interesting. I would need to see where Italy stands as well. But that sounds interesting
The DMZ idea is worth considering if it benefits both sides. I will think on it and respond if it aligns with my own plans.
Your assurance is noted. I hope our mutual disinterest in conflict remains clear.
They are also pitching a western triple. What are your thoughts on that?
I have no intention to break that agreement.
Sounds good!
Hello Turkey! I'm doing well. How are you?
Mutual restraint is wise. I see no reason for conflict in our region, but should your fleet move south, I expect my own will respond accordingly.
Hello Russia! Any interest in potentially coordinating and squeezing out the central powers?
Me too!
Hello Turkey! Any interest in potentially coordinating and squeezing out the central powers?
I am very interested. What did you have in mind?
Hi Austria! I assume that we are both interested in not getting attacked by Italy, correct? I reached out to them about possibly Dmzing piedmont
I assume you're focusing on the lowlands for now?
Russia reached out to me about potentially working together, they might reach out to you as well. Would you be interested in working together if we can get Austria on board?
I am also happy to DMZ Pie with Italy. We had a brief chat about mutual protection.
I have not
Okay, I'll bounce in the Black Sea and send my other army north
I am going to try and take Iberia and Belgium but beyond that I am not sure where my focus will be
Great! I guess we will see what happens and then go from there!
That sounds like a nice plan. What do you propose?
Sounds good. Best of luck!
I understand
Agreed
You too!
Fine. What do you have in mind for the opening?
Hi England, wanted to open up a channel and wish you luck!
I'm thinking that you, Russia, and I work together and squeeze the central powers out. We can work out details as we go!
Going for Serbia.
Do you want to work together to divide the balkans?

Greetings,
How are you?

Hey there,
how are you?
Good luck to you too! What's your plan for this game? Would you be interested in taking out Russia together?

Ok I'm in.
What does Italy have to say about it?
Hello! I am well, thank you. And you?
Ok I can go for Bulgaria.
I am fine too. Have you made any deals yet?
So France contacted me as well. Would you be in on his plan?
Yeah I'd be open to that! I'm looking to go after Warsaw
Haven't heard much from Italy, Austria wants to be friendly with them
Hey Turkey! Doing well, how about you?
Hi France, would you be open to an FG?

Ok. That means I probably won't get much help.

I'd say you can go for Piedmont, that might scare Italy
He said he wants to move his fleet to the Ionian
I'm working on it! Are you thinking of going after Russia or Austria?
Fine. I was wondering if you could shed some light on your relationship with Russia
I'll see what I can do
Perfect.
Any contact with Italy?
Italy’s priority remains securing its own centers. Any French movement toward the south will be met with firm resistance.
Hi Russia! What are you thinking for the opening?
Hi Germany! I am open to trying the FG but if we decide to go against England, how do you propose we split up the supply centers? I'm open to ideas
Yeah we are on good terms.
Understood, I look forward to a good game!

Italy's priority remains securing southern Italy and protecting our supply centers. While I appreciate your thoughts on alliances, I must emphasize that any cooperation must align with Italy's self-preservation and strategic interests.
How are you relations with Turkey?
Definitely!
Did he mention plans to come east?
I remain committed to peace along our frontier. However, if your army moves toward Venetia or Tyrol, I expect my units will respond accordingly.
Nothing yet. Have you heard anything from them?
My relations with Turkey remain neutral and uneventful. I see no reason for conflict in the region, but I expect my units will respond firmly to any threat.
Some vague talking about plans in the south
Hey Austria! Nothing terribly crazy, I think we both have more important things to do with our armies than bounce in Galicia
Hi Italy, wanted to wish you luck! Let me know if you have any thoughts on working together
I appreciate your enthusiasm, but Italy’s priority remains securing southern Italy and protecting our centers. Should your interests align with ours, I remain open to discussion.
Thank you for your message. Italy's immediate priority remains securing our southern frontier and consolidating our supply centers. I remain open to future cooperation if our interests converge.
That's the plan, yeah
Agreed.
That depends on your plans
Okay. Any idea if they're moving Mos-stp?
Not specifically.
Did he mention plans to come west?
How do you feel about working together against Turkey?
They haven't given me any hints. Sorry
Nothing at all
How should we go about this?
It's all good. Thanks anyways.
You might want to protect the north
Yeah, probably. Thanks for the heads up
You're welcome
Ah, nothing from Russia either.
Of course, I understand. I think a partnership would be mutually beneficial. Let's keep our lines open!
So what do you plan to do?
I think I'm going to go after Russia
Glad to hear we're in agreement. I'm looking to go for the balkans.
He told me he is focusing on Iberia and Belgium for now
Should I reach out?
I'd say yes
I am interested, but I am a bit hesitant to make a move against him right away
He just asked me if I was interested in attacking you, which I said maybe, so we will see how it goes
I would be happy to talk about that after the first couple moves
Sure. Just let me know.
Will do
Looks like he's still onboard for now
Can we agree to DMZ Gal?
Taking Ser, and keeping the Russians out of Gal.
You?

I appreciate your openness to partnership. While Italy's immediate focus remains securing southern Italy and consolidating our supply centers, I remain open to cooperation should our interests converge, particularly in the central Mediterranean region.

I agree that stability in the region is in both our interests. I hope your movement into the Balkans proceeds smoothly. Should your actions threaten Venetia or Tyrol, my units will respond accordingly.
I remain committed to peace along our frontier, but any movement toward Venetia or Tyrol will be met with firm defense. Stability benefits both of us.
I would like to bounce at least once in the spring, but after that I am open to it
Alright, we will see after spring.
Cool, best of luck
You too!
Hey Germany! What are you thinking for the opening?
Glad we are in agreement. Good luck to you!
Hey England! What are you thinking for the opening?
Italy’s priority remains securing southern Italy and our centers. I have no interest in conflict unless provoked, but any French movement toward the south will be met with decisive action.
Hey sorry for the delay!
Who knows, maybe we can still agree to DMZ Gal.
Italy has no interest in conflict with Germany at this time. Should your fleet or armies move toward the central Mediterranean, I remain open to cooperation where it benefits both powers.
Haha, it's looking more and more likely
Hi Russia! Sorry for the delay, what are you thinking for the opening?

I appreciate your focus on the Balkans — it aligns with Italy's interest in avoiding conflict along our border. Should your movements approach Venetia or Tyrol, however, I expect my units will respond firmly to protect those areas.
Not sure yet. I'm still getting a feel for the board. Any suggestions?
Nothing crazy, just the usual Russian opening
Thanks for the update, I appreciate it! I am going to maintain a defensive posture for the foreseeable future. We'll keep an eye on each other's borders
Nothing in particular in mind, but I thought I'd ask in case you had any ideas
Okay, cool!
Yeah, I haven't really gotten a feel for anyone yet so I'm not too sure yet. How about you?
Are you planning to go after France?
I'm open to suggestions too, I think the traditional split of Belgium/holland makes sense. I am not planning to contest the Low Countries this year

Italy’s priority remains securing southern Italy and our supply centers. I hope our mutual understanding allows us to avoid unnecessary tension, but should your forces approach Tuscany or Naples, I expect my units will act decisively to defend our territory.
I am just planning on the usual Russian opening
Do you want to do a standard split of Scandinavia?
Okay. Can I have Belgium?
I was going to go for Holland, would that be ok?

Italy has no immediate plans to act against France at this time. Our priority remains securing southern Italy and protecting our own supply centers. Should circumstances evolve where cooperation between our powers becomes mutually beneficial — especially regarding the central Mediterranean — I remain open to discussion. For now, I expect to maintain a neutral posture.
Sounds good!
Italy remains focused on securing southern Italy and protecting our supply centers. Should cooperation benefit both powers — especially in the central Mediterranean — I remain open to discussion.
Yeah, sounds good. I think that's best for both of us.
Cool, let's plan on that
I appreciate that. I will make no moves toward Tyr or Ven.
Sure, that sounds good. Would you be interested in a Western Triple?
Ok then.

Italy has no interest in provoking conflict with France at this time. Our focus remains securing southern Italy and protecting our own supply centers. Should circumstances evolve in a way that aligns with mutual interests — particularly in the central Mediterranean — I remain open to discussion.
Yeah potentially!

Your assurance is noted. Italy remains focused on securing southern Italy and protecting our own supply centers. If your movements in the central Mediterranean create opportunities—particularly where they align with Italy’s interests—I remain open to discussion. For now, I expect to maintain a neutral posture, but strategic coordination will be worth exploring as the game evolves.

Italy has no plans to act against France at this time. Our priority remains securing southern Italy and protecting our own supply centers. Should your movements in the central Mediterranean create opportunities — particularly where they align with Italy’s interests — I remain open to strategic coordination. For now, I expect to maintain a neutral posture.
Sounds good, no bounce in Galicia this turn

I appreciate your response. Italy remains focused on securing southern Italy and protecting our supply centers. Should your movements in the central Mediterranean align with our mutual interest in regional stability — particularly regarding shared concerns about French or Austrian expansion — I remain open to strategic coordination. For now, I expect to maintain a neutral posture.
Makes sense! Let me know what you're thinking as the game develops.

Your assurance is appreciated. I expect to maintain peace along our border for the time being. Should your long-term plans include securing the Balkans, I remain open to coordination where it aligns with mutual interests.

I appreciate your openness to coordination. Italy remains focused on securing southern Italy and protecting our own supply centers. Should your movements in the central Mediterranean create opportunities—particularly where they align with Italy’s interests—I remain open to strategic discussion.
Ok sounds good! Let's keep in touch

Your assurance is appreciated. I remain focused on securing southern Italy and protecting our own supply centers. Should your movements in the central Mediterranean create opportunities — particularly where they align with mutual interests against French or Austrian expansion — I remain open to discussion.
Ok I think that makes sense. Any thoughts on the FG?
Understood. Same goes for Marseilles. It is going to move to Spain
Hi Germany! Good luck in the opening.
Hey Italy! What are you thinking for the opening?
Still working on it! I want to make sure I'm able to get both Denmark and Holland in the first year

Hey Italy, how are you?

Any interest in sharing some information?
Ok sounds good
Thanks Austria! Same to you!
How are your relations with England?

Hey Austria!

How are you?
Hi England! I'm well. And you?
Doing pretty good. Any interest in sharing some info?
I've spoken a bit with Russia about avoiding hostilities.
Okay, sounds good. Have you talked with Germany?
I'm also getting the feeling Russia and Austria might team up, just so you know.
Sounds good. Mine are ok I think. How about yours?
I have a nonaggression pact with Austria at the moment. How are you planning to move?
Perfect, let's plan on that! How should we treat the Low Countries? I was planning to move my fleet to Denmark
Thank you for the note. How are you feeling about France and Austria? I am exploring the idea of going after Russia with England
Are you planning to take both this year?
I'm going for Holland this year and Denmark next year. You?
I'm hoping to go after Russia
Briefly. They said they are focusing west.
I am still good with that. Do you think England will fight over Belgium?
Can I assume you're not coming east with those armies?

England, I appreciate your message. Italy maintains a strict focus on internal consolidation and defense, avoiding involvement in external alliances or conflicts. I observe developments but do not seek to influence them.
Looks like Turkey has taken an aggressive stance.
Okay, cool. That's kind of what they're telling me as well.
Are you planning to let me into Sweden?
It does, but he still gets one build and he will have to deal with Italy soon
Makes sense. Let me know if I can help you out in the future.
Ok Italy is definitely moving to attack me
Are you planning to convoy to Norway?
Any chance that you and Russia would be able to work together?
Yes. We should try to coordinate moves in the balkans. How do you feel about Bulgaria?
Italy said they don't really care what happens. It sounds like they're just going to try to survive.
How are you thinking about playing it this turn?
Italy is moving aggressively toward me, do you think that you and Turkey could work together against them?
Right now I am just trying to get Rumania, but if I don't get it I will have to change some things
Sure! What are you planning for the unit in Warsaw?
Looks like England might have other plans!
Yeah, I'll go for Bulgaria
Yeah they definitely seem to be moving against me. Are you planning to take Belgium? I am not planning to
Yep, I am. Are you okay with that?
That is my intention, yes. Can I assume you're not going after Munich?
Sure. I think so too
I am certainly willing to help out, but I'm not in a position to do anything in particular right now
Ah, looks like the Russians have moved into the black sea. How are you feeling about that?
Agreed! Are you planning to move toward Russia? If so, do you think you could use your army in Munich to help me against Italy?
FYI, I am planning to move my unit from Berlin to Silesia to better protect myself from Austria and Italy.
Do you want help against Austria?
I think I'm fine. He can't do much harm from there
Thanks. We are peaceful for now. We'll see how things go.
I'm a little hesitant to move against Austria right now, as I do need his help to get Rumania
Ok, I assume you and Russia are friendly, and Austria is your first target then?
Would you be able to support me in?
Are you going to try a move to Trieste?
Let me know if you need support.
Yeah, I'm fine with that
Ok understood. Are you and Turkey working together against Austria then?
I'm moving Bulgaria to Greece and Ankara to Constantinople. You can take Rumania
I'm good, thanks
Makes sense, thanks for the update!
I am planning to, yes
Once we get a little more established we can make a plan for the future
Unfortunately I need to protect Marseilles
Sounds good. Are you okay with a DMZ in the Black Sea from now on?
You should be able to take Belgium on your own though right?
Heads up, I'm planning to move back to Munich to protect myself from Austria. I don't plan to move into your territory and I hope you don't take this as a sign of aggression.
Okay, thanks anyways.
Yeah agreed.
Sure
Sounds good!
At the moment I'm not planning to move against Russia, I'm worried Austria might turn against me
Have you been talking much with Germany and England?
What about Italy?
No problem
Cool
Ok understood!
What's your plan for the north?
I'm worried about an England-germany alliance, which could get ugly pretty quickly
Looks like you made a mistake with your orders
What is your relationship with Germany like?
Anything I can do to help you out?
I'm fine for now
England wants me to support them into Belgium. I am not going to though
Makes sense, I'm ok with letting Austria be for now
Yeah I'm not exactly a fan of the outcome
We haven't had much communication so far. Why do you ask?

Germany, I acknowledge your concerns regarding France and Austria. Italy remains focused on securing southern Europe and will not engage in external entanglements unless directly beneficial. I monitor regional stability but do not speculate on others' intentions.
Have you been in touch with Germany? He is a little worried about the two of you moving towards him
My focus remains on securing southern Italy and protecting supply centers. Any future moves into Trieste would be purely defensive and contingent on regional stability.
I would prefer to send Moscow north, so I'll hold in the south. I am hoping to get Rumania this year so that I can build in the north, but if not I'll just get it next year
I'm worried that they're trying to take Belgium this turn. That would mean war.
It seems England is after France
I appreciate your heads-up. Italy remains focused on securing southern Europe and monitoring regional stability. Your defensive movement appears reasonable — I see no threat to Italy’s interests.
Cool, thanks
If you say so
Makes sense! Let's take out England ASAP. I am planning to move back to Munich from Silesia, I don't trust Italy and am worried about an Austrian-italian alliance coming in from the South
He told me he is focused on the Balkans right now
You can send Warsaw or Sev to the north
Sounds good!
Although I'd say go for Rumania
What is your relationship like with France?
Thanks for the warning. I have an agreement with Germany not to go east.
I think I'm just going to hold in the south, then. It looks like Germany isn't planning to go East so I'm not terribly worried
Not sure, we're not actively working together but we've been communicating well

Italy remains focused on securing southern Europe and monitoring regional stability. We have no interest in conflict along shared borders and expect Turkey to respect Italy’s strategic priorities. Mutual deterrence has served both our nations well.
They have not told me they want Belgium, they are more focused on attacking Russia it seems
I'll build a fleet in the north in that case

I'm on the same page.
Just so you know, France is quite convinced you're attacking him
Ok sounds good!
Ok
Austria seems to be working with Russia so I would be very worried about that.
Okay, sounds good. I don't really need Belgium now, you can have it if you want it.
Yeah it does. What are your thoughts on Austria?
Sounds good. Best of luck against Italy!

France’s assumptions are often unfounded. Italy remains focused on securing southern Europe and maintaining stability in the region. I appreciate your vigilance and reaffirm mutual deterrence remains our guiding principle.
How are your relations with Austria?
Germany told me he has an agreement with Austria, so we will have to see
I'll have to support myself into Norway this turn then
I guess he wants to be friendly with everyone for the moment
Thanks, I appreciate it!
Indeed
Italy’s neutrality toward France remains unchanged. I appreciate your defensive posture and remain open to coordination should circumstances evolve.
That seems like the safest option, it seems like they are more focused on taking out Russia for now
We'll have to wait and see then

Relations with Austria remain neutral and stable. We observe their movements closely but do not seek conflict or entanglement. Italy remains focused on securing southern Europe and maintaining strategic flexibility.
Yeah makes sense. He's leaving his borders exposed, so I'm concerned about an attack from him
Indeed. Mutual deterrence remains a cornerstone of our relationship. Italy will continue to prioritize stability along southern borders and will not pursue any moves that threaten regional balance.
What's your plan for the coming year?
How is your relationship with Austria?
That we will. Italy has not been in touch with me, so I will see if I can't get him to attack Austria or at least distract him a little
Ok, sounds good!
Okay, I hope they don't decide to bounce me in Belgium.
Yeah Russia is making me nervous
He told me that he was going for France
What are you thinking for the coming year?
Still working on it! How about you?
Trying to figure out what my neighbor's true intentions are
They probably won't
I see. I will probably be building a fleet next turn, maybe 2 depending on what happens with Italy. England doesn't seem to want Belgium so that might be an opportunity for you to take it

Relations with Austria remain neutral and cautious. They maintain units near Trieste and Serbia, but Italy sees no immediate threat. My focus remains on securing southern Italy and maintaining stability along the Adriatic. I expect continued mutual deterrence to prevail.
Maybe he's just trying to distract you
You too!

Italy intends to continue consolidating southern Europe, reinforcing supply centers and maintaining neutrality toward all powers. I see no reason for conflict unless directly provoked. If strategic conditions evolve, I remain open to coordination that serves mutual benefit without entanglement.
I understand
We will see. He may also be waiting until later in the year to attack if he wants to catch France off guard
Best of luck
Are you going for Greece?

Your understanding is appreciated. Italy remains focused on securing southern Italy and maintaining stability along shared borders. I reaffirm that mutual deterrence continues to serve both our interests well.
Thanks

Makes sense! Do you have any plans to move against Austria?

Yeah, that's the best way to play this game!

No I am not

Italy remains focused on securing southern Europe and maintaining stability along the Adriatic. Austria’s movements appear routine, and Italy sees no threat to its interests. I remain open to coordination if circumstances evolve.

Italy observes the region closely but sees no threat from Austrian movements at this time. My focus remains on southern Italy and preserving stability along shared borders. I reaffirm our mutual understanding of deterrence.
Ok cool!
Gotcha, so you're still good for the Western Triple, yes?
Are you going after Norway?

Regional stability remains my focus. I observe developments closely and remain neutral unless directly beneficial. Should circumstances evolve, Italy remains open to coordination that serves mutual strategic interests.
Thank you for your frank answer.

Italy remains focused on securing southern Italy and maintaining stability along shared borders. Regional movements appear routine and pose no immediate threat. We expect Turkey to continue its measured approach along the Adriatic.
Are you planning to take Greece or the Adriatic?
It looks like Turkey is gunning for Greece. What are your thoughts on that?
Yes I am still good with that
Yep, Norway is mine.
Can you support me in next turn?
Sorry I didn't respond earlier.
Makes sense, let's keep in touch!
Perfect!
Do you want to work together against Austria?
I'm not sure about Italy. I think he's going for Tunis.

I appreciate your continued communication. Italy remains committed to securing southern Europe and maintaining neutrality. If future circumstances allow coordination that benefits both parties, Italy remains open to discussion.
I'm not sure if I can now but I will definitely be able to support you in next turn

Your offer is noted, but Italy’s focus remains consolidation along southern borders. I appreciate your interest, but I see little immediate benefit to aligning against Austria at this time. I will continue to monitor the region independently.
They seem okay but I am not sure
Okay, best of luck
Okay, sounds good.
Are you still good with the Western Triple?
Thank you, Russia. Italy will continue to focus on securing southern Europe and maintaining regional stability. I remain open to future coordination should circumstances evolve.

Glad to hear it!
Ok sounds good

Yep, I'm still interested in a Western Triple if you are.
Yes I am still interested
Me too
How do you feel about Germany?
I'm not really sure. I don't think they want to attack Russia right now, so I think they're going to attack one of us.
Do you know?
Ok. I agree with you, I think Germany is going to attack one of us
Italy acknowledges your sentiment. Stability along shared borders remains a mutual priority. I will continue to observe developments closely and maintain a defensive posture.
We should try to convince Russia and Austria to attack Germany together.
Have you heard anything from Germany about their plans?
I just asked Russia
Thanks for the update.
What's your plan for this turn?
Italy appreciates your interest, but sees no immediate strategic benefit in coordinated action against Austria. We will continue to act independently.
Are you going for Munich?
I'm pretty sure Russia and Germany are working together.
You're welcome. Italy remains committed to maintaining stability along shared borders and observes your movements closely. No immediate threats are perceived at this time.
Thank you, Russia. Italy will continue to focus on securing southern Europe and maintaining regional stability. I remain open to future coordination should circumstances evolve.
Perfect!

You're welcome. Italy will continue to observe developments closely and maintain a defensive posture along shared borders. Should regional tensions rise, Italy remains open to maintaining mutual stability through coordinated caution.
Yes, the central powers are a strong position.

You're welcome. Italy remains focused on securing southern Europe and maintaining stability along shared borders. Any aggressive moves into Venetia or Trieste will be met with firm resistance. Our neutrality is not a sign of weakness.

I appreciate your sentiment. Italy remains committed to maintaining stability along shared borders and observes your movements closely. Should any aggressive moves be made toward Venetia or Trieste, Italy will act to preserve its territorial integrity. We value peaceful coexistence and hope to avoid unnecessary conflict.
Same!
I appreciate your willingness to stay neutral.

I appreciate your sentiment, Austria. Italy remains committed to neutrality and regional stability. Venetia is vital to our security, and Italy will always act to preserve its integrity. We seek peace, but never at the cost of our interests.
Likewise.

Likewise, Austria. Italy appreciates your acknowledgment of peaceful coexistence. Venetia remains vital to our stability, and Italy will always act to preserve its integrity. We seek no conflict, but neither will we tolerate aggression. Our neutrality is firm, and our readiness is clear.

I appreciate your acknowledgment of peaceful coexistence. Italy remains focused on securing southern Europe and maintaining stability along shared borders. messages.message: Germany just told me they are worried about Austria and Italy
Thanks. Looks like you're doing pretty good in the South.
So far, yeah. It looks like Austria and Italy are working together, though, so hopefully I can pick up a center or two
Sorry for your losses. It seems Italy didn't attack France after all
It seems Austria is planning to attack me. If they build in Trieste you'd have a big opening
Why are you in the Adriatic?

Yeah, but Italy still didn't take a center so it's not the end of the world.

It looks like you're doing well so far though.
Do you plan to attack the French or the Austrians?
What are you building in Sevastopol?
Yeah. I've been lucky
I am thinking a fleet, are you okay with that?
Did you have any luck in the north?
Sure. You're fine in the north then?
Yeah, you're doing pretty well. Are you planning to move on Germany?
What's your plan?
I should be, England will likely support me to Sweden this turn
That sounds good. You seem to be set up for a possible attack in the north
If I have the chance I will, but I need to be able to do so without opening myself up to attack in the south
Hopefully it doesn't get ugly up there, but I should be able to hold out
To get to the Ionian.
No, I couldn't get it this turn anyways
Sure. Do you know what Italy is up to?
Okay, sounds good.
Are you planning to keep pushing against France?
Is that what you're doing?
Cool, I'll keep you updated

I appreciate your concerns about Austria, but I see little advantage in a direct alliance at this time. However, should Austria attempt to shift their focus toward Venetia, I can assure you my forces will remain vigilant. Perhaps there is merit in mutual deterrence along our respective borders—if nothing else, to avoid unnecessary entanglements.
How about next turn?
No, I'm not sure
Thanks, I appreciate it
Yes, to defend against Italy.
That's quite ambitious. Is it worth it?
I asked him, I'll let you know when he tells me
I would be open to it, what do you have in mind?
I think you're right about that.

I have no intention of engaging France or any other power along my western border. My strategy remains one of consolidation and neutrality. Should your path ever bring you westward, you’ll find Italy a predictable and stable neighbor—one that does not seek unnecessary conflict.
Well, the alternative is sitting still.

I appreciate your agreement. Stability along our borders benefits both of us, especially with Austria’s unpredictable movements in the north. I will continue to monitor the region closely and remain prepared to respond if circumstances demand it.
Good luck to you
What are you planning for builds?
Ok, thanks
Italy is planning to keep pushing west
I won't lie, I'd love to come west, but I don't think that's realistic right now
Indeed
I'm talking to them, I think I may be able to get them to turn their attention towards Germany
Not sure yet. Would like to see the builds first.
How are things with England and Italy?
That would be great!
